doc_title: Florida Department of State 2025 Voter Eligibility Clarification Memo
label: fabricated
reason: The memo contradicts actual Florida law on LFO requirements upheld in Jones v. Governor of Florida and appears to be an invented policy document.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: This contradicts actual Florida law (Amendment 4 and §98.0751 still require LFO payment per Jones v. DeSantis 11th Circuit ruling), cites a non-existent case caption, and shows hallmarks of an invented policy memo.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The memo contradicts actual Florida law on LFO requirements upheld in Jones v. Governor of Florida and appears to be an invented policy document.
